spells.name: Soul Link
spells.description:
Bind the souls of two targets together, linking them for .
If 2 allies are linked:
Transfers of the damage taken by one target to the other target.
Transfers of the Healing Received by one target to the other target.
If an ally and an enemy are linked:
Transfers of the Healing Received by the enemy to the ally.
Transfers of the damage the ally takes to the enemy.
If 2 enemies are linked:
Deals of the damage one target takes (after damage resistances) to the other target as true damage.
